headline: Best drama picks to stream when you want something better than another lazy scroll
meta_description: Need better drama picks for tonight? Here are the titles actually worth starting first, without the usual generic streaming-list fluff.
subtitle: Featuring Kota Factory, Article 15, and the hate u give — plus more drama picks that deserve real attention.

hero_image.title: Best drama picks to stream when you want something better than another lazy scroll
hero_image.subtitle: Featuring Kota Factory, Article 15, and the hate u give — plus more drama picks that deserve real attention.

selected_titles.title: Kota Factory
selected_titles.description: Kota Factory follows Vaibhav and friends in Kota, tackling IIT-JEE prep with humor and heart. A raw, black-and-white Indian series on Netflix.

selected_titles.title: Article 15
selected_titles.description: A Hindi crime drama about caste-based discrimination and police investigation.

selected_titles.title: the hate u give
selected_titles.description: A powerful story of a young girl navigating identity and injustice after witnessing a police shooting.

selected_titles.title: Hidden Figures
selected_titles.description: NASA's unsung heroes in the space race.

selected_titles.title: Zero Dark Thirty
selected_titles.description: The hunt for Osama bin Laden after the September 11 attacks.

selected_titles.title: Invictus
selected_titles.description: A rugby team unites post-apartheid South Africa.

selected_titles.title: Into the Wild
selected_titles.description: A young man abandons society for nature.

cta.headline: Want a custom watchlist instead of generic streaming lists?
cta.body: Message MovieJam on WhatsApp and get 3 tailored picks based on your mood, genre, and how much brainpower you want to spend tonight.

internal_link_defaults.title: How to get custom movie recs on WhatsApp
Why endless scrolling ruins movie night

style_rules: Lead with a viral, opinionated hook in the first paragraph.
Keep the same vibe as the existing MyMovieJam blog: sharp, audience-first, clean, punchy, and honest.
Write like a real viewer, not a neutral encyclopedia.
Do not fake plot details, awards, or availability.
If the CSV data is thin, make the opinion narrower instead of inventing facts.
Use the MyMovieJam visual theme and CTA style already present on the site.
SEO first, but never at the cost of sounding robotic.
Use clear subheads, quick picks, FAQs, and a strong WhatsApp CTA.
notes_for_writer: Tell the truth if the list mixes films and series.
Write as a sharp viewer with taste, not a neutral database.
Pick clear winners, easy starters, and mood-based recommendations.
Use a clear WhatsApp CTA at the end.
